title: Olympus Gold pvp pack
description: Gold colour themed pvp texture pack. Better with CPVP and Sword

# Olympus Gold
Gold colour themed minecraft pvp teture pack for better experience.
- Retextured End Crystal
- Retextured Respawn ancher
- Low Fire Texture
- Retextured Items
 >  1. Sword, Axe, Picaxe
> 2. Shield, Enderpearl, Gapple
> 3. Trident, Elytra, Armor

## Cool Looking Start Screen With Panorama
![Cool looking start screen with panorama ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aab4d9ed0a6c0f0ea40f05e098e191e6993a4d7_0.webp)

### Upgraded GUI
- New Font
- New Buttons
- New Hotbar
- New Half transparent Inventory HUD

![New HUD ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36c299f49602ee13176f7498c6a11a76543de644_0.webp)

### Armor and Crystal
  - Gold colour End Crystal
  - 4 Staged Respawn Ancher
